title: The Little Elephant Who Dreamed in Colors
moral: Everyone has a special talent inside them. When you dare to dream and try something new, amazing things can happen.
moralZh: 每个人内心都藏着一项特别的才能。当你敢于梦想、尝试新事物时，美好的事情就会发生。

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Every year, the animals in Sunny Jungle held a big talent show. All the animals practiced their special skills to show off.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Monkeys swung from trees. Parrots sang beautiful songs. Lions danced with big strong steps. Everyone was excited!

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: But little Ellie the elephant sat sadly by the big pond. She watched the other animals practice. She did not know what her talent was.

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "Monkeys swing. Parrots sing. Lions dance. But what can I do? I am just an ordinary elephant. I have no special talent."

paragraphs.speaker: Leo
paragraphs.text: "Hey, Ellie! Why are you sitting here alone? Are you practicing for the talent show?"

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "No, Leo. I have no talent. I cannot swing like the monkeys. I cannot sing like the parrots. I am just... ordinary."

paragraphs.speaker: Leo
paragraphs.text: "That is silly! Everyone has something special inside them. You just have to find it!"

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "But I looked everywhere. I do not have anything special."

paragraphs.speaker: Leo
paragraphs.text: "Have you tried using your imagination?"

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "My... imagination?"

paragraphs.speaker: Leo
paragraphs.text: "Yes! Close your eyes and dream. What do you see in your mind?"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ellie closed her eyes. In her mind, she saw beautiful colors — red, blue, yellow, and green — swimming and dancing together!

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "I... I see colors! So many beautiful colors!"

paragraphs.speaker: Leo
paragraphs.text: "There you go! You have an imagination! Now let us see what you can do with it!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ellie ran to the old shed behind the school. She found some old jars of colorful paint — red, blue, yellow, green, and purple!

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "I know! I will try to paint!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ellie picked up a big brush with her trunk. She dipped it in blue paint and splashed it onto the canvas. Then yellow. Then red!

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: As she painted, something magical happened. The colors began to sparkle and dance! They turned into beautiful pictures — a sunny jungle, a rainbow over the pond, and her friends playing together!

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "Wow! This is... this is a masterpiece! My imagination made it come alive!"

paragraphs.speaker: Penny
paragraphs.text: "Ellie! What is that amazing picture? It is so beautiful!"

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "I painted it with my imagination, Penny! I discovered something I can do!"

paragraphs.speaker: Penny
paragraphs.text: "It is extraordinary! You should show everyone at the talent show!"

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "Really? Do you think they will like it?"

paragraphs.speaker: Penny
paragraphs.text: "Like it? They will love it! It is so unique! No one else in the whole jungle can paint like you!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: On the day of the talent show, all the animals sat in the big clearing. Monkeys swung. Parrots sang. Lions danced. Then it was Ellie's turn.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ellie walked to the front. She was very nervous. Her tummy felt all twisty.

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "I... I am not like the other animals. I cannot swing or sing or dance. But I have a talent too."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ellie lifted her big canvas. As she painted with her magical imagination, the colors danced and sparkled. They turned into a beautiful rainbow over the whole jungle!

paragraphs.speaker: Leo
paragraphs.text: "That is the most extraordinary thing I have ever seen!"

paragraphs.speaker: Mrs. Bear
paragraphs.text: "It is like magic! You made art come alive!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: All the animals cheered and clapped. Their stomps made the ground shake!

paragraphs.speaker: Parrot Polly
paragraphs.text: "Bravo, Ellie! You are so creative! Your painting is the most unique talent of all!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ellie smiled a big smile. She felt so happy inside.

paragraphs.speaker: Ellie
paragraphs.text: "Thank you, everyone. I thought I was just ordinary. But with my imagination, I discovered my talent. You just have to believe in yourself and dream big!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: All the animals gave Ellie a big hug. She was the star of the talent show. And every day after that, Ellie painted more beautiful pictures — because she knew that imagination is the most magical talent of all.
